name: Washed Cotton Velvet Square Throw Pillow Gray - Threshold™: Indoor Use, Hidden Zipper, 18x18"
description:
This Gray Washed Cotton Velvet Square Throw Pillow from Threshold™ brings elegant style to your living space. Featuring a soft and smooth, 100% cotton velvet shell with soft filling, this square throw pillow adds comfort and style to any chair, sofa or bed it's tossed on. Best of all, it's designed with a hidden zip closure for easily removing the pillow cover. Designed in a gray hue with a washed finish, it's sure to complement a variety of decor styles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
